summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sereni AI chatbot. Backend APIs working well (93.3% success). Frontend core functionality working including auth, chat, crisis detection, and conversation management. Critical mobile sidebar overlay issue identified blocking user interactions.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 403 instead of 401 for unauthorized requests
minor_bugs.impact: Status code inconsistency, but auth protection still works

openai_integration.issue: API calls returning fallback error messages instead of AI responses
openai_integration.symptoms: All chat responses show: 'I'm here for you. I'm experiencing a brief moment...'
openai_integration.impact: AI chat functionality not working as expected but has proper error handling

critical_bugs.issue: Sidebar modal overlay blocks all button interactions after opening mobile menu
critical_bugs.symptoms: Timeout errors on all sidebar button clicks due to modal overlay interception

ui_bugs.issue: DOM element attachment instability when modal state changes
ui_bugs.impact: Grounding exercise modal sometimes fails to respond to interactions

accessibility_warnings.issue: Missing DialogTitle and aria-describedby for screen readers

passed_tests: Landing page loads with proper UI and branding
User registration flow with form validation
User login flow with JWT authentication
Crisis detection working perfectly - high-risk messages trigger crisis panel
Sentiment analysis detecting risk levels correctly
Conversation history creation and listing in sidebar
Beautiful therapeutic design with sage green color scheme
Backend APIs: health checks, auth endpoints, chat endpoints, conversation CRUD

critical: Fix mobile sidebar Sheet component overlay issue - sidebar modal not closing properly and blocking all interactions
important: Investigate OpenAI API integration - all responses are showing fallback error messages instead of actual AI responses
Fix grounding modal DOM stability issues for better user experience
optional: Add proper DialogTitle and aria-describedby attributes to Dialog components for accessibility
Consider changing 403 to 401 status code for unauthorized auth requests for consistency
